label: Régler la luminosité
description: Allows for the control of the relative level of a device like a light or a dimmer switch in step size.

stepLevel.label: Régler la luminosité
stepLevel.description: Change the level by the given amount. If the level exceeds the minimum (typically 0) or maximum (typically 100) then it will be clamped to those values.

stepSize.description: The amount to change from current level, usually ``-100 to 100`` in percent
